payload.text:
All 10 steps complete. Final summary:

**TP-016 Complete** — `aliases` field added to `CommandMeta` with full plumbing:

- **`@crustjs/core`**: `aliases?: readonly string[]` on `CommandMeta`; alias resolution in `resolveCommand` (canonical path preserved); shared `validateAliasString` + `validateIncomingAliases` helpers in `validation.ts` invoked from both `.command()` overloads and `validateCommandTree`; `details.available` in `COMMAND_NOT_FOUND` now includes aliases.
- **`@crustjs/plugins`**: `helpPlugin` renders `name (a, b)` inline; `didYouMeanPlugin` matches against aliases but reports canonical names (with dedup).
- **`@crustjs/man`**: `mdoc.ts` renders aliases on the `.It Nm` line; column width adjusted.
- **Docs**: `api/types.mdx`, `guide/subcommands.mdx` (with worked example + conflict policy + error message), `modules/core.mdx`, `modules/plugins/help.mdx`, `modules/plugins/did-you-mean.mdx`.
- **Changesets**: 3 minor bumps (core, plugins, man).
- **Tests**: 459 core + 106 plugins + 5 man + 130 crust + others — all green.
- **Quality gates**: `bun run check && check:types && test && build` all clean.
- **Reviews**: 7 plan + 6 code, all APPROVE (one REVISE on Step 3 for Biome formatting was addressed and re-approved).
- **STATUS.md**: marked ✅ Complete with full Discoveries table including the TP-009 (`hidden`) absence, TP-010 (completion plugin) cross-talk note, and out-of-scope follow-ups.
